**Step 2**: 
Instruction 1 requires the plan to be written in the first person (using "I", "me", "my", "we", "our"). Instruction 2 requires the plan to be written in the third person (using "he", "she", "they", or specific names/titles). The Model Response consistently uses first-person pronouns ("I", "my", "our", "we"), thereby fully satisfying Instruction 1 and failing Instruction 2.

llm_response:
To ensure success this quarter, I have crafted a focused roadmap for our sales team.

INDIVIDUAL GOALS
I will set personal targets aligned with the overall revenue projection. Each rep must hit specific monthly sales figures to drive growth. I will track individual performance metrics weekly, adjusting tactics as needed. My strategy involves prioritizing high-value leads and refining our pitch based on client feedback.

TEAM GOALS
Our collective objective is to exceed the quarterly revenue target by 10%. I will foster collaboration through daily stand-ups and weekly strategy sessions. We will share best practices to boost overall team performance. Success depends on our unified effort and mutual support.

BUDGET AND TIMELINES
I have allocated 40% of the budget for lead generation tools and 30% for client events. The remaining funds cover training and incentives. Key milestones include launching the new campaign on Day 1, reviewing mid-quarter results on Day 45, and finalizing the report by Day 90. Strict adherence to this timeline is crucial.

PERFORMANCE METRICS
I will monitor conversion rates, average deal size, and pipeline velocity. These metrics will guide our adjustments. Regular reviews will ensure we stay on track. By focusing on these key indicators, I can optimize our approach.

Together, we will achieve our goals.
